endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ddosProtectionPlans
endpoints.description: Gets all DDoS protection plans in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ddosProtectionPlans
endpoints.description: Gets all the DDoS protection plans in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ddosProtectionPlans/{ddosProtectionPlanName}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the specified DDoS protection plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DDOSPROTECTIONPLANNAME}} with a real ddosprotectionplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ddosProtectionPlans/{ddosProtectionPlanName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a DDoS protection plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DDOSPROTECTIONPLANNAME}} with a real ddosprotectionplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ddosProtectionPlans/{ddosProtectionPlanName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified DDoS protection plan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DDOSPROTECTIONPLANNAME}} with a real ddosprotectionplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ddosProtectionPlans/{ddosProtectionPlanName}
endpoints.description: Update a DDoS protection plan tags.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DDOSPROTECTIONPLANNAME}} with a real ddosprotectionplanname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
